title: If I Could Turn Back Time
meaning_summary: If I Could Turn Back Time still earns because it remains one of Cher's most familiar power-pop recordings and keeps resurfacing through classic-pop nostalgia.
revenue_drivers: The song retains strong recognition across late-1980s and adult-pop playlists.
Its chorus-driven familiarity makes it durable in recurrent listening.
Legacy radio and event-driven use help preserve catalog value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes long-tail streaming, recurrent playlist use, and lighter sync-style reuse than Believe.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out song position
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public breakdown of master and publishing receipts.
